title: Taking Child to Hospital 带孩子看病

lines.speaker: Parent
lines.content: Doctor, my son has had a fever for two days. It goes up to 39 degrees at night.
lines.cn: 医生，我儿子发烧两天了。晚上烧到39度。

lines.speaker: Doctor
lines.content: I see. Does he have any other symptoms, like cough, sore throat, or stomach pain?
lines.cn: 明白了。他还有其他症状吗，比如咳嗽、喉咙痛或肚子疼？

lines.speaker: Parent
lines.content: He has a slight cough and says his throat hurts when he swallows. He is not eating much.
lines.cn: 有点咳嗽，他说吞咽时喉咙痛。他吃得不多。

lines.speaker: Doctor
lines.content: Let me check his throat and listen to his lungs. Please sit him on the examination bed.
lines.cn: 让我检查一下他的喉咙和听一下肺部。请让他坐到检查床上。

lines.speaker: Parent
lines.content: Sure. Come here, sweetheart. The doctor is going to help you feel better.
lines.cn: 好的。过来，宝贝。医生会帮你感觉好起来的。

lines.speaker: Doctor
lines.content: It looks like a throat infection, probably viral. His lungs are clear, which is good news.
lines.cn: 看起来是咽喉感染，可能是病毒性的。肺部没问题，这是个好消息。

lines.speaker: Parent
lines.content: Do we need antibiotics? Or can we just give him fever medicine at home?
lines.cn: 我们需要抗生素吗？还是在家给他吃退烧药就行？

lines.speaker: Doctor
lines.content: No antibiotics needed for now. Give him acetaminophen for the fever and make sure he drinks plenty of water.
lines.cn: 目前不需要抗生素。给他吃对乙酰氨基酚退烧，并确保多喝水。

lines.speaker: Parent
lines.content: How long until he gets better? Should we bring him back if the fever continues?
lines.cn: 多久能好？如果发烧继续，我们要带他回来吗？

lines.speaker: Doctor
lines.content: He should feel better in three to five days. If the fever lasts more than five days, bring him back.
lines.cn: 三到五天应该能好转。如果发烧持续超过五天，再带他回来。
